title: Vidhigya Associates acts on Afcom Cargo ₹199 crore QIP
description: Afcom Holdings Limited, dba Afcom Cargo, has raised ₹199.85 crores from a qualified institution placement of 26,30,520 equity shares.Vidhigya Associates advised GYR Capital Advisors Private Limited, the Book Running Lead Manager, and acted as the sole legal counsel for this QIP.The transaction team consisted of Vedang Mehta (Associate Partner) and Yash Desai (Senior Associate).Afcom CargoAfcom Cargo is engaged in the business of providing air cargo transportation and logistics solutions, special
